dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: `tests/integration/test-precommit-block.sh` fails on a fresh run (8 failures); the migrated pre-commit shims exit 1 before emission because they source `"$FURROW_ROOT/bin/frw.d/lib/blocker_emit.sh"` from a fixture-derived root where that file does not exist.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: The new shell-helper branches are not directly exercised: `rg` finds no tests for `precommit_event_bakfiles`, `precommit_event_typechange`, `precommit_event_script_modes`, `stop_event_ideation`, or `stop_event_summary`, including the new empty-payload short-circuit added in `d5935e3`.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The acceptance criteria require each shim to do only three operations with no shell-side condition checks, but `pre-commit-*.sh`, `stop-ideation.sh`, and `validate-summary.sh` now add `_ev=...` plus `[ -n "$_ev" ] || exit/return 0` logic in the shim body.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: `definition.yaml` limits this deliverable’s file ownership to `bin/frw.d/hooks/**`, `bin/frw.d/lib/**`, and `.furrow/almanac/todos.yaml`, but commit `781681b` also adds `.furrow/rows/blocker-taxonomy-foundation/research/hook-audit-final.md` without documenting a file-ownership exception in the change.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1` passes, executable line counts stay within the 30-line budget, and `shellcheck` on the changed shell files reports only non-failing SC2317 info on the idempotent source guards.
